ham.subject: Out of Office: Rajesh Kumar – 10 Oct 2023
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Mujhe 8 Oct 2023 se 10 Oct 2023 tak office se bahar rahna padega aur is dauraan mujhe emails ka access nahi hoga.

Agar koi urgent matter ho, to kripya meri colleague Priya Sharma se sampark karein at priya.sharma@example.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

Shukriya,
Rajesh

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Your Crypto Wallet has been Suspended
spam.body:
Dear Valued User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your crypto wallet account. As a security measure, we have temporarily suspended your wallet. To prevent permanent loss of your funds, please verify your account within the next 24 hours.

Click the link below to verify:
<URL>

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your wallet will be permanently frozen and your funds will be inaccessible.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
Crypto Security Team
